actual_title: Inputs, Outputs, States, and Stopping Conditions

cards.title: Inputs
cards.governance_note: Define type, format, source, units, missingness, validity, and rejected input behavior.

cards.title: Outputs
cards.governance_note: Define output meaning, uncertainty, confidence, interpretation limits, and failure results.

cards.title: States
cards.governance_note: Track valid states, invalid states, history, memory, and allowed transitions.

cards.title: Stopping Conditions
cards.governance_note: Define halting, no-solution, escalation, timeout, convergence, and handoff rules.
